# Voynich Quantum Metrics Definition

## Metrics Overview

- **ψ-overlay correlation patterns**
- **Δ (Delta) Discrepancy Measure**: Quantifies divergence from source frequency
- **F (Fidelity Score)**: Measures alignment with source quantum state
- **Multidimensional Observables**: Energy signatures tied to page categories

## Observational Correspondence

| Page Category | Observable Type | Quantum Symbol | Description |
|---------------|-----------------|----------------|-------------|
| Botanical     | Entanglement    | ψ_plant        | Linked growth patterns |
| Astronomical  | Overlay Mapping | ψ_star         | Celestial influence |
| Anatomical    | Information     | ψ_body         | Biophysical resonance |

## CSDE Mapping

These metrics are used to construct input observables for the CSDE Engine (泉珠).
